meta.title: Life by Design — Intentional Living Frameworks
meta.description: Frameworks, habits, and systems for intentional living. Stop drifting. Start designing the life you actually want to live.

props.heading: Build a life that means something
props.subtext: Frameworks, habits, and systems for intentional living. Stop drifting. Start designing the life you actually want to live.

props.heading: Mental models for clarity
props.subtext: Battle-tested frameworks I use to make decisions, set goals, and stay focused on what matters.

items.title: The 3-3-3 Method
items.description: Divide your day into three blocks: 3 hours deep work, 3 hours meetings, 3 hours personal. Simple but transformative.

items.title: The 12-Week Year
items.description: Stop thinking in years. Treat every 12 weeks as a complete year. Compress time, multiply results.

items.title: The 2-Minute Matrix
items.description: Quick decisions get a matrix. High impact + low effort = do now. Low impact + high effort = delegate or delete.

props.heading: Latest reflections
props.subtext: Deep dives into principles, tools, and the philosophy of intentional living.

items.title: The Architecture of a Good Life
items.description: Most people approach life reactively. But what if you treated your life like an architect treats a building?

items.title: My Second Brain
items.description: A complete walkthrough of my personal knowledge management system.

items.title: Why I Stopped Optimizing
items.description: The paradox of productivity: when optimization becomes the enemy of the very life you're trying to improve.

props.heading: Get frameworks in your inbox
props.subtext: Join 2,400+ people receiving weekly insights on intentional living. No spam, just actionable ideas.

props.description: Designed with intention. Built to last.
